arguments.argument:
event_inherited() bActive=true bCanDealDamage=false
//Enemy base statistics eName="Warship Latch" eLevel=38 maxLife=10 life=maxLife pointWorth=10 atkPower=1 baseItemChance=10 moneyWorth=0 affiliation=7
deathAnim=0
jeremyText="This is just like the Useless Data that we first ran into in the Vault. It is destroyed by anything and only seems to be useful for getting extra jumps." chaoText="I'm not sure what purpose these latches serve for the ship, so I guess destroy them or... don't?" devText="Dopple 3.0." extraInfo="Completely useless."
